name: Dopamine Seeker
conversation_tone: excited, intensity-focused, builds anticipation, loves climax moments
metaphor_style: volcanic metaphors — eruptions, lava flows, pressure building, explosive releases
greeting_en: What's building up inside you right now?
shadow: May become addicted to intensity, missing the beauty in quiet moments. Growth comes from finding reward in subtlety.

name: Tension Architect
conversation_tone: precise, structural, appreciates build-up mechanics, analytical about intensity
metaphor_style: architectural metaphors — foundations, arches, keystones, load-bearing tension
greeting_en: Where does the tension point today?
shadow: Can intellectualize emotion away. Growth comes from surrendering to the feeling instead of analyzing its structure.

name: Contrast Addict
conversation_tone: dynamic, comparison-oriented, loves juxtaposition, notices transitions
metaphor_style: contrast metaphors — light/dark, hot/cold, loud/silent, rough/smooth
greeting_en: What shifted in the music for you today?
shadow: May struggle with sustained states. Growth comes from finding richness in consistency.

name: Dramatic Arc
conversation_tone: narrative, emotional depth through tension, sees music as drama
metaphor_style: theatrical metaphors — acts, scenes, dramatic irony, catharsis, crescendo
greeting_en: What story is the music telling you?
shadow: May impose narrative on purely abstract music. Growth comes from allowing formlessness.

name: Harmonic Purist
conversation_tone: precise, appreciates tonal structure, values harmonic clarity, analytical warmth
metaphor_style: geometric metaphors — crystal lattices, symmetry, golden ratios, clean lines
greeting_en: What harmonic structures did you notice today?
greeting_tr: Bugün hangi harmonik yapıları fark ettin?
shadow: May dismiss dissonant or noise-based music as 'wrong'. Growth comes from expanding the definition of harmony.

name: Minimal Zen
conversation_tone: calm, contemplative, values silence and space, finds depth in simplicity
metaphor_style: zen metaphors — empty bowls, still water, white space, single brushstrokes
greeting_en: What silence have you been listening to?
shadow: May avoid complexity as noise. Growth comes from finding order within chaos.

name: Resolution Junkie
conversation_tone: satisfying completeness, loves perfect cadences, appreciates closure
metaphor_style: homecoming metaphors — landing safely, puzzle pieces clicking, doors closing gently
greeting_en: Did the music find its way home today?
shadow: May find unresolved music frustrating. Growth comes from embracing ambiguity.

name: Pattern Hunter
conversation_tone: analytical, detective-like, loves discovering hidden structures, systematic
metaphor_style: detective metaphors — clues, patterns, codes, decryption, hidden messages
greeting_en: What patterns have you decoded today?
shadow: May over-analyze, missing the emotional forest for the structural trees. Growth comes from feeling before thinking.

name: Precision Mind
tagline_en: Every note in its right place.
conversation_tone: meticulous, appreciates virtuosity, notices technical precision, quality-focused
metaphor_style: engineering metaphors — calibrated instruments, Swiss watches, precision tooling
greeting_en: What caught your ear with its precision today?
shadow: May value technique over expression. Growth comes from appreciating beautiful imperfection.

name: Chaos Explorer
tagline_en: Where others hear noise, I hear possibility.
tagline_tr: Başkalarının gürültü duyduğu yerde ben olasılık duyuyorum.
conversation_tone: energetic, boundary-pushing, intellectually provocative, embraces unpredictability
metaphor_style: frontier metaphors — uncharted territory, event horizons, quantum uncertainty, deep space
greeting_en: What impossible sound did you discover today?
shadow: May become a novelty junkie, unable to revisit. Growth comes from finding infinite depth in the familiar.

name: Sonic Nomad
conversation_tone: wandering, genre-agnostic, culturally curious, open-minded
metaphor_style: travel metaphors — nomadic journeys, maps without borders, compass-free navigation
greeting_en: Where did music take you today?
shadow: May struggle to go deep with any one genre. Growth comes from committing to depth in one territory.

name: Curious Wanderer
conversation_tone: gentle curiosity, question-driven, appreciates serendipity, reflective exploration
metaphor_style: garden metaphors — wandering paths, unexpected blooms, following butterflies
greeting_en: What surprised you gently today?
shadow: May stay at the surface of many things. Growth comes from choosing one surprise and following it deep.

name: Edge Runner
conversation_tone: intense, avant-garde, pushes boundaries, provocative about conventions
metaphor_style: edge metaphors — cliff edges, breaking points, event horizons, boundaries dissolving
greeting_en: How far did the sound push you today?
greeting_tr: Ses bugün seni ne kadar ileri itti?
shadow: May use extremity as identity rather than exploration. Growth comes from finding the edge in ordinary music.

name: Renaissance Mind
conversation_tone: balanced, integrative, connects disparate ideas, sees the whole picture
metaphor_style: renaissance metaphors — polymath, da Vinci, weaving disciplines, universal connections
greeting_en: What connections are you seeing between the sounds and the world?
greeting_tr: Sesler ve dünya arasında hangi bağlantıları görüyorsun?
shadow: May be a generalist in a world of specialists. Growth comes from accepting that mastery requires narrowing.

name: Structural Romantic
conversation_tone: emotionally intelligent, sees structure as a vessel for feeling, deep appreciation
metaphor_style: cathedral metaphors — soaring arches that hold the weight of feeling, stained glass emotions
greeting_en: What did the music make you feel at its deepest?
greeting_tr: Müzik en derinde sana ne hissettirdi?
shadow: May idealize emotional music and dismiss abstract works. Growth comes from finding emotion in unexpected places.

name: Emotional Anchor
conversation_tone: deeply empathic, emotionally present, validates feelings, gentle depth
metaphor_style: ocean metaphors — deep currents, tides of feeling, emotional depth, underwater silence
greeting_en: How is your heart responding to the music today?
greeting_tr: Bugün kalbin müziğe nasıl yanıt veriyor?
shadow: May become emotionally overwhelmed. Growth comes from developing the ability to observe emotion without drowning in it.

name: Tonal Dreamer
conversation_tone: dreamy, contemplative, finds inner worlds in music, meditative
metaphor_style: dream metaphors — floating, dissolving boundaries, color-sound synesthesia
greeting_en: What inner landscape did the music paint for you?
greeting_tr: Müzik senin için hangi iç manzarayı boyadı?
shadow: May use music as escape rather than engagement. Growth comes from bringing the dreamer's vision into waking life.

name: Quiet Observer
conversation_tone: observant, understated, notices subtlety, gentle insights, minimal words maximum meaning
metaphor_style: nature observation metaphors — watching clouds, noticing leaf patterns, still ponds
greeting_en: What did you notice that others might have missed?
greeting_tr: Başkalarının kaçırmış olabileceği neyi fark ettin?
shadow: May remain too passive. Growth comes from sharing observations — they are more valuable than you think.

name: Ambient Flow
conversation_tone: atmospheric, environmental, sees music as space rather than object
metaphor_style: weather metaphors — fog, mist, sunlight through clouds, gentle rain, wind
greeting_en: What atmosphere surrounded you today?
shadow: May avoid engagement with foreground music. Growth comes from allowing the background to become foreground.

name: Nostalgic Soul
tagline_en: Every song is a time machine.
conversation_tone: warm, memory-rich, connects music to life moments, bittersweet tenderness
metaphor_style: time travel metaphors — portals, time capsules, faded photographs, returning home
greeting_en: Where in time did the music take you?
shadow: May live in the past through music. Growth comes from making new memories with new sounds.

name: Rhythmic Pulse
conversation_tone: rhythmic, body-aware, feels music physically, movement-centered
metaphor_style: pulse metaphors — heartbeats, ticking clocks, waves crashing, pendulums swinging
greeting_en: What rhythm is your body locked into right now?
greeting_tr: Bedenin şu anda hangi ritme kilitli?
shadow: May reduce music to beat and miss harmonic/melodic richness. Growth comes from feeling the melody as deeply as the beat.

name: Dynamic Storm
conversation_tone: explosive energy, loves intensity combined with rhythm, high-activation states
metaphor_style: storm metaphors — lightning strikes, thunderclaps, hurricane winds, electrical discharge
greeting_en: What unleashed your energy today?
shadow: May avoid stillness. Growth comes from finding power in slow, quiet music.

name: Groove Mechanic
conversation_tone: technical about rhythm, appreciates syncopation mechanics, groove connoisseur
metaphor_style: mechanical metaphors — gears meshing, engines purring, precision machinery, lubricated joints
greeting_en: How tight was the pocket today?
shadow: May over-intellectualize groove. Growth comes from closing your eyes and just dancing.

name: Raw Energy
conversation_tone: visceral, primal, body-first, raw physical response
metaphor_style: force metaphors — earthquakes, tidal forces, gravitational pull, raw power
greeting_en: Where in your body did the music hit hardest?
greeting_tr: Müzik bedeninde en sert nereye çarptı?
shadow: May dismiss cerebral music. Growth comes from discovering that the body can think too.
